raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehnîsch Jo-
rans bija pahrgahjis/ ka wiꞥſch
Jesreêlā kttohs dseedinatees no-
teem Sitteneein/ ko tee Sihreri
tam bis fittuschi/ kad tas prett
Asaêlu to Sihreru Kehnixu kar-
roja. Un Jeûs fazzija: Ja tas
jums patihk/ tad laid ne weens
no Pilsfahta ne iſeet un afsbehg/
ka tas ne eet us Jesreêlu/ un to
stahsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad jahje Jeûs/ un no-
gahje us Jesreêlu / jo Jorams
gulleja tur. Un Akasijus tas
Kehnîsch no Juha bia nogah-
jis Joranu aplinhkoht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Waktneeks/ kas
us Jesreêles Turni stahweja/ re-
dseja Jeûfa Pulku nahkam/ un
fazzija: Es redsu weenu Pulku.
Tad fazzija Jorams: Nemun
weenu Jahtneeku/ un fuhti to
wiweem pretti/ un lai tas fak-
ka: Irrag Meers?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Jahtneeks jahje
tam pretti/ un fazzija: Ta fak-
ka tas Kehnîsch: Irrag Meers?
bet Jeûs fazzija: Kas tew ar
Meeru jadarra? greesees atpak-
fak pakfak manni. Tad fluddi-
naja tas Waktneeks/ un fazzija:
Tas Wehstnefs irr pee teem nah-
zis/ bet tas ne nahk atpakfak.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad isfuhttija wiꞥſch zit-
tu Jahtneeku/ un kad tas pee
teem nahze/ fazzija tas: Ta fak-
ka tas Kehnîsch: Irrag Meers?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad pafluddinaja tas
Waktneeks/ un fazzija: Wiꞥſch
irr pee teem nahzis/ bet ne atgree-
schahs/ un ta Dsihschana irr ta
patt ka Jeûfa Nimsus Dehla
Dsibschana/ jo wiꞥſch ka traks
dsennahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jorams:
Fejnhdseet/ tad tappe wiꞥſna
Ratti eejuhgtti/ un Jorams tas
Israêta Kehnîsch isgahje/ ir A-
kasius tas Kehnîsch no Juha/
ikkatrs us fatweim Ratteim / un
tee isgahje Jeûfam pretti/ un
fastappe to us Nahbata ta Jes-
reêlitera Tihrumu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Jorams Jeûſu
redseja/ tad fazzija wiꞥſch: Ir-
rag Meers Jeûs? bet tas fazzi-
ja: Kahds Meers? zeekans ta-
was Mahts Isebetes Manko-
schana un Apmahnetchana au-
gamo aug.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad apgreeſe Jorams
fawu Rohku/ un behdse/ un faz-
zija us Akasiju: Sche irr Wil-
tus/ Akasijus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Jeûs uſwille te
Stohpu ar pillu Rohku / ur
schahwe Jorann starp wiꞥſa
Rohkahm/ka ta Bulta zaar wi-
na Sirri iſskrehje/ un tas nola-
dahs eekſch fatweem Ratteim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jeûs us t
Wirfneeku Videkaru: Nemmi
un mett wiawu us Nahbata t
Jesreêlitera Tihrumu. Jo a
"
    }
  ],

  "notes": ""
}
